name: The Abandoned Shrine
narrative: You stumble upon a crumbling shrine half-buried in moss. The stone altar still hums with faint energy. Offerings of bone and wildflower line the base. Whatever god once dwelt here, some trace of power remains.

choices.label: Pray
choices.description: Kneel before the altar and offer a moment of reverence.

outcome.description: The shrine's warmth suffuses you. You feel restored.

choices.label: Desecrate
choices.description: Smash the altar and take whatever valuables remain.

outcome.description: Gold spills from the cracked stone — but a dark whisper follows you.

name: The Wandering Merchant
narrative: A cloaked figure emerges from the shadows, cart laden with curious wares. "Trade, friend? Or perhaps you prefer... a different kind of acquisition?" His smile doesn't reach his eyes.

choices.label: Trade
choices.description: Pay 20 gold for a random Uncommon card.

outcome.description: A fair exchange. You pocket a promising card.

choices.label: Rob
choices.description: Take everything. There will be consequences.

outcome.description: You seize the merchant's gold, but his cry echoes through the dungeon. Something heard it.

name: The Cursed Chest
narrative: An ornate chest sits alone in the center of the room, wreathed in a faint violet glow. Ancient warnings are scratched into the stone around it. The lock is already broken.

choices.label: Open it
choices.description: Claim the rare gear inside. The curse will cost you.

outcome.description: Power surges through you — but something vital drains away.

choices.label: Walk away
choices.description: Leave the chest untouched. Better safe than sorry.

outcome.description: You leave the room. Some doors are best left closed.

name: The Wounded Soldier
narrative: A soldier lies against a broken pillar, clutching a wound that still seeps. Her armor bears a sigil you don't recognize. "Help me," she whispers. "I can fight for you... if I survive."

choices.label: Help
choices.description: Lose 5 HP to treat her wounds. She offers you her battle companion.

outcome.description: She presses a card into your hands before limping away. "Use it well."

choices.label: Ignore
choices.description: You have your own battles to fight.

outcome.description: You walk past in silence. The dungeon offers no rewards for mercy you don't give.

name: The Crossroads
narrative: Three paths diverge before you. A faded signpost offers cryptic directions: left toward distant light, right toward the clang of metal, and straight ahead into darkness so thick it swallows sound.

choices.label: Left path
choices.description: Follow the light. Gain knowledge of what lies ahead.

outcome.description: From a vantage point, you spy the layout of the dungeon ahead.

choices.label: Right path
choices.description: Follow the sound. Discover a discarded piece of gear.

outcome.description: Among the wreckage, you find gear that still holds together.

choices.label: Straight ahead
choices.description: Brave the darkness. Skip ahead on the map.

outcome.description: The darkness spits you out further than expected. You've bypassed a section of the dungeon.
